decisions.label: Gate enumeration omits the Tunnel remote app-server step
decisions.rationale: Explicitly gate Tunnel remote app-server and cleanup/restore with stale != true, not just via secret-step cascade.

decisions.label: Stale-check script exit-code behavior on API failure is not pinned down
decisions.rationale: Script will always exit 0 and encode uncertainty through stale=false plus reason output.

decisions.label: Closed/merged PR is not in the staleness policy
decisions.rationale: Closed or merged PRs will be treated as stale no-touch skips because the PR no longer needs singleton Mac capacity.
